message:
fix(ansi): Escape C1 control characters in OSC 8 URLs

Previously, escape_url_for_osc8() only escaped C0 control characters
(U+0000-U+001F) and DEL (U+007F). This left C1 control characters
(U+0080-U+009F) unescaped, which some terminals interpret as:

- U+009B (CSI) = ESC[  (Control Sequence Introducer)
- U+009C (ST)  = ESC\  (String Terminator)
- U+009D (OSC) = ESC]  (Operating System Command)

This could allow escape sequence injection in URLs on vulnerable terminals.

Fix: Use char::is_control() to detect and escape all control characters,
including both C0/DEL and C1 control ranges.

Added test case for C1 control character escaping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
